beats.activity: Wake up, coffee, check emails and client messages on phone.
beats.reasoning: Linda wakes early on Sunday with full energy; real estate agents work weekends for open houses. Quick morning routine to prep for a busy day of showings and networking.

beats.activity: Power walk around Mercer Island Park loop to clear head and stay energized.
beats.reasoning: Linda is a power walker; a sunny Sunday morning is perfect for her routine exercise before a full day of client interactions and open house viewings.

beats.activity: Drive to Bellevue office, calls with clients en route.
beats.reasoning: Linda drives everywhere and is obsessed with open houses; Sunday morning commute to Bellevue office to prepare for a day of property showings and client calls.

beats.activity: Prepare open house materials, review new listings, make networking calls from office.
beats.reasoning: Real estate work on Sunday morning: prepping open houses, organizing client portfolios, and networking calls—core to Linda's always-networking personality.

beats.activity: Drive to first open house showing in Bellevue.
beats.reasoning: Short drive within Bellevue to reach the first open house of the day; Linda is obsessed with open houses and Sundays are prime showing time.

beats.activity: Host open house showing, greet potential buyers, discuss property features and market trends.
beats.reasoning: Linda loves open houses; Sunday mid-morning is peak traffic for showings. She networks and engages deeply with each prospect, consistent with her personality.

beats.activity: Drive to upscale lunch spot in Bellevue, calls with clients.
beats.reasoning: Linda lunches at upscale spots and drives everywhere; she takes a brief networking-friendly lunch break between open house showings.

beats.activity: Upscale lunch, take client call mid-meal, discuss new listings and market updates.
beats.reasoning: Linda lunches at upscale spots and is always networking; she works through lunch, handling client calls and market talk—never truly off the clock.

beats.activity: Drive to second open house on the Eastside, calls with potential buyers.
beats.reasoning: Sunday afternoon is prime real estate time; Linda heads east to Redmond for a second showing, staying in motion and networking throughout the drive.

beats.activity: Host second open house, show property, answer buyer questions, hand out business cards.
beats.reasoning: Second open house of the day; Linda is in her element networking with prospective buyers and showcasing properties—core to her obsession with open houses.

beats.activity: Drive home to Mercer Island, listening to real estate podcasts and taking client calls.
beats.reasoning: End of Sunday showings; Linda heads home, using the drive time productively for client calls and professional development—she's always working.

beats.activity: Relax on patio, review photos from open houses, light dinner prep, answer non-urgent emails.
beats.reasoning: Wind-down evening at home on Mercer Island; sunny weather makes the patio appealing. Linda reviews the day's work and preps for tomorrow while staying at home before sleep.

beats.activity: Dinner, evening leisure, wind down, and sleep.
beats.reasoning: Full night's sleep at home, ending early Monday morning—Linda needs recovery after a full day of open houses, showings, and constant networking.
